name: Business lead scraper with AI cleaning to Google Sheets
description: Scrapes a business directory or listings page with Firecrawl, uses Claude AI to extract and clean lead data (names, emails, phones, companies), and saves the structured leads to Google Sheets.

source.originalName: Automate business lead scraping from Apify to Google Sheets with data cleaning

firecrawlKey.description: Firecrawl connection key for scraping the listings page

sheetsKey.description: Google Sheets connection key for saving leads

targetUrl.description: URL of the business directory or listings page to scrape (e.g. 'https://www.yelp.com/search?find_desc=plumbers&find_loc=San+Francisco')

leadType.description: Type of leads to extract (e.g. 'plumbers', 'SaaS companies', 'restaurants')

steps.name: Scrape business listings page with Firecrawl
Build AI prompt for lead extraction and cleaning
Run Claude AI to extract and clean leads
Save cleaned leads to Google Sheets
